original_abstract: Abstract In computer vision, a series of exemplary advances have been made in several areas involving image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and image super-resolution reconstruction with the rapid development of deep convolutional neural network (CNN). The CNN has superior features for autonomous learning and expression, and feature extraction from original input data can be realized by means of training CNN models that match practical applications. Due to the rapid progress in deep learning technology, the structure of CNN is becoming more and more complex and diverse. Consequently, it gradually replaces the traditional machine learning methods. This paper presents an elementary understanding of CNN components and their functions, including input layers, convolution layers, pooling layers, activation functions, batch normalization, dropout, fully connected layers, and output layers. On this basis, this paper gives a comprehensive overview of the past and current research status of the applications of CNN models in computer vision fields, e.g., image classification, object detection, and video prediction. In addition, we summarize the challenges and solutions of the deep CNN, and future research directions are also discussed.
humanized_abstract: Recently, the computer vision has achieved many breakthroughs on many aspects of image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and image super-resolution due to the huge development of the deep convolutional neural network (CNN). With the training of CNN, the characteristics extraction from the original image data can be realized, and this shows the strong advantage of deep learning for feature learning and expression. In addition, the structure of the deep learning model is more and more complex, and the variety is also becoming greater and greater. Thus, the deep learning is more and more applied in the research field of machine learning. This paper is for beginners, which gives a brief introduction about the basic components and functions of a CNN model. Then the paper gives a systematic and overall description and prospect of the development trend and status of the research of deep learning models for computer vision, including many applications such as image classification, object detection, and video prediction. Finally, this paper discusses the current challenges and countermeasures of the deep CNN model, and gives the corresponding future development trend.
